programme.desc: The controversial policy of caste-based reservations in government jobs and educational institutions in India leads to a conflict between a teacher hailing from a lower class, his good friend belonging to the upper caste, and his mentor.

programme.title: Ye Kaisa Pal Do Pal Ka Pyar
programme.desc: Gangotri Pictures Pvt. Ltd's Ye Kaisa Pal Do Pal Ka Pyaar is a love story that's set in a village. Seema (Lovely Joshi), who is a daughter of a high caste Pandit Deendayal, falls in love with an educated Dalit boy Nikhil (Uttam Kumar. When Pandit Deendayal doesn't approve of their love, the two lovers elope, only to be chased by Pandit Deendayal's henchmen, whom Nikhil kills one by one. Amidst all this, there is also a parallel story that speaks of an enmity between Pandit Deendayal and Thakur Surendra Singh Rana, whose enmity gets further fanned up by two villagers Abdul and Malkhi.

programme.title: Teri Talash Mein (dub)(unnaruge Naan Irundhal Tamil)
programme.desc: After her father's sudden death, Mahalakshmi is left to clear his debts and face the harsh villagers. A taxi driver helps her cremate her father and pledges his taxi to earn her a temporary reprieve.

programme.title: Kuch Toh Hai
programme.desc: The movie follows the story of a young couple who move into a new house, only to discover that it is haunted by a mysterious presence. As they try to unravel the truth behind the entity, they uncover a dark secret that threatens their very existence.

programme.title: No Smoking
programme.desc: A heavily addicted smoker is unprepared for the true price he must pay when he asks a guru's help to kick the habit.

programme.title: Love Finds You In Valentine
programme.desc: Kennedy Blaine, a Californian girl, inherits a ranch in the small town of Valentine in Nebraska. Before she sells the property, she decides to spend the summer in her house and learn more about her family.

programme.title: Ouija House
programme.desc: A girl takes her friends to a house with a dark past for a research project. They unwittingly summon an evil entity with plans of its own who makes the house part of its sinister game.

programme.title: A Life Lived
programme.desc: After a childhood friend's death, Jake Taylor, an all-star athlete must change his life - and sacrifice his dreams to save the lives of others.

programme.title: Always And Forever
programme.desc: After a tragedy reunites Nicole with her childhood friends, they each find themselves in danger, targets of a deranged stalker. Nicole knows this can't be a coincidence. The secrets of their past are coming back to haunt them.

programme.title: A Picture to Remember
programme.desc: Masha is in love with Igor, her college mate, and wants to marry him, but he does not seem in much of a hurry to lead the girl to the altar.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Beti Hamari Anmol
programme.desc: In this hugely inspirational success story, Anmol, a small town girl, not only fights the societal obstacles faced by any small town girl in our country but also takes on the social stigma she has had to face for being so short heighted that she has been termed as a “dwarf”. Anmol, with her strong will power and belief in herself, fights the hate she has had to receive from her in-law's. Anmol becomes a doctor with the support of her husband, in the same hospital where her father works as a peon, to win back her dignity as well as bring a lot of pride to her and her in law's family.

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Har Har Bhakti
programme.desc: Listen to Har Har Bhakti Devotional songs and start your day with praise of gods and goddesses. These songs are composed to inspire reverence, devotion, and connection with the divine.

programme.desc: After a night out in a downtown Denver nightclub, Kenia Monge wanders the streets without a purse or phone her journey leads to encounters with several men --some good, and one who drives a creepy white van.

programme.title: Man With a Van
programme.desc: When Ray and Marie Thornton go out for a drive in the country on Easter Sunday, they are almost chased off the road by a tailgating van and when they see the driver changing license plates and dumping a bloody sheet, they call police.

programme.title: Man With a Van
programme.desc: Meredith Emerson decides to celebrate the new year by hiking on Georgia's Blood Mountain with her dog, Ella, but when Meredith goes missing and Ella is found 60 miles away, an all-out search begins.

programme.title: Man With a Van
programme.desc: Dawnia Dacosta attends nursing school, works the late shift and goes to church for evening services one night she runs out of fuel and walks to the nearest station then a man in a van offers a ride back to her car.

programme.title: Evil Kin

programme.title: पॉलिटिकल किस्से
programme.desc: कुछ तारीखें हैं, कुछ किस्से हैं जो देश की राजनीति में हलचल लेकर आयीं और उसका impact पूरे देश पर आया। इन्हीं तारीखों के भीतरखाने क्या कहानी रही, जानिए विस्तार से सौरभ द्विवेदी के साथ हर मंगलवार सिर्फ बाजा पर।

programme.sub-title: A Fatal Student Night (Stéphane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: THE CASE OF STÉPHANE KAMEUGNE - On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school. A theory soon emerged: the very drunk student had fallen over thea bridge over the canal which led to his death. But his parents and relatives did not believe this.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.sub-title: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)
programme.desc: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)- On March 31, 2003, firefighters were called to a fire in a housing estate of Meyrargues, near Aix-en-Provence. On site, they discovered a horrific scene: the tortured and charred bodies of a mother and her daughter, Chantal and Audrey D'Amato, aged 53 and 24 respectively.

programme.desc: In order to repair the paladins' flying ship, Brokr the blacksmith needs a Troll's tusk. So, Ian, Myrva and Gmor must face the dangers lurking among the tunnels under the mountain, deadly beings made of shadow and the fierce Troll to whom the tusk belongs. Meanwhile, on the surface, the corruption spread by Arcana seems to have doomed the mountain...

programme.desc: When JD and Kent discover there's a shortage of beeswax for their surfboards, it leads to the discovery that all the local honeybees have vanished from the beehives.

programme.title: A New Friend
programme.desc: A small bird wants to befriend Mr. Bean, but its squawking sound annoys Mrs. Wicket.

programme.title: The Lift
programme.desc: Mr. Bean goes on a lift to the top floor of a toy shop, but Teddy gets stuck in the doors and jams the lift.

programme.title: Dig This
programme.desc: It is a nice sunny day and Mr. Bean and Mrs. Wicket are relaxing in the garden.

programme.title: Bean Hypnotised
programme.desc: Mr. Bean attends a hypnotism show where he unwittingly volunteers to be hypnotized.

programme.title: Car Wash
programme.desc: After a stubborn bird deliberately defecates his Mini, Mr. Bean washes it.

programme.title: Where Did You Get That Cat?
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket has a new hat that looks like Scrapper.

programme.title: Valuable Lessons
programme.desc: Two burglars hatch up an evil plan in which one of them disguises himself as a gentleman.

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Mr. Bean prepares to give the children some tricks and treats they won't forget.

programme.title: Bean Painting
programme.desc: Mr. Bean paints a picture of Teddy, but accidentally splashes some green paint on the wall.

programme.title: Wrestle Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is trying to read a book but he is disturbed by the noise of Mrs. Wicket and her friend.

programme.title: Rare Bird
programme.desc: Mr. Bean loves bird spotting and is desperate to tick off the last elusive bird in his book.

programme.title: Bean's Safari
programme.desc: Mr. Bean visits a safari park where he catches the attention of a baby monkey.

programme.title: A Round of Golf
programme.desc: Mr. Bean fancies a game of golf.

programme.title: Superhero Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes a superhero in an attempt to stop a cunning thief.

programme.title: What A Load Of Rubbish
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is a bit too enthusiastic while cleaning his flat and Teddy ends up on his way to the dump.

programme.title: The Robot
programme.desc: Mr. Bean buys a robot to clean his flat, but it ends up creating destruction across London.

programme.title: Ice Cream
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants an ice cream cone from the ice cream van.

programme.title: Birthday Party
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is feeling down when everyone forgot his birthday.

programme.title: In The Garden
programme.desc: Mr. Bean tries to cut the grass in the garden but finds it impossible.

programme.title: A Magic Day Out
programme.desc: Mr. Bean and Irma are off for a day at the seaside.

programme.title: Ball Pool
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to play inside the local play area, but he is not allowed to enter.

programme.title: Pizza Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean orders a takeaway pizza, but when it arrives, he feels let down by the size of it.

programme.title: The Photograph
programme.desc: The airport personnel refuses to let Mr. Bean take a flight due to his passport having no photo.

programme.title: Dancing Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean needs to learn to dance to impress his girlfriend Irma.

programme.title: Bean Shopping
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is locked in a department store overnight having the time of his life.

programme.title: Game Over
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes obsessed with gaming after being introduced by Mrs. Wicket's nephew.

programme.title: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket demands that Bean stay in to take delivery of a new lounge chair.

programme.title: A Dog's Life
programme.desc: Mr Bean dog-sits for Irma and while in the park comes across a professional dog-walker.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S1 Ep 20
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Babblu Dablu Bust Ep 21
programme.desc: The bumbling but lovable Bear Brothers are back, and Logger Vick remains in hot pursuit! Their latest adventures take our heroes out of the forest and into the big city, where they make new friends and a host of wonderful discoveries...and where they learn a few fabulous new tricks for escaping the clutches of the villainous Vick!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awosomeness Ep 15
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they' re learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures...

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Minecraft and Roblox and More with Amy Lee
programme.desc: Check it out for videos on Minecraft, Roblox, The Sims plus other great games!Hey Guys! I am Amy Lee! Welcome to my Channel!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Meet the Monster Trucks, a gang of colossal, hard-working cars who team up to help their friends and community in Monster City.

programme.title: Argo' s World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Gogobus S01 Ep 20
programme.desc: This series is about the adventures of the children, in a beautiful coastal town, who are learning and playing in Sunshine Forest Kindergarten. To keep the children safe, the kindergarten owner builds the world's first artificial intelligence school bus.

programme.title: Robinhood EP 14
programme.desc: Robin's house was burned to ashes by the order of Alwyn, the Baron of Nottingham. Robin and his cousins Will, Winifred and Jenny flee into Sherwood Forest, hoping to escape persecution. They end up encountering a group of bandits led by Little John, who dubs himself as Big John during the beginning of the series, until Robin pokes fun renaming him "Little John" for playing with a cat.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family purchase, sell and evaluate items with fascinating stories.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Safarnama
programme.desc: Safarnama is more than just a mere journey one wants to complete just to check out that one task from the ‘ToDo List”. It is something just one of its kind. In Safarnama, we are up for a soulfulfilling journey with Ankit Siwach that is to begin in Mumbai and cease at Ladakh. This journey is to witness numerous unseen moments and unfelt experiences via a thrilling, adventurous route. It isn't just about navigating roads using GPS but more of digging deeper into the beauty of India to understand life better.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Parikrama
programme.desc: A journey to experience the most revered religious sites of India. A spiritual – travel series which unfolds untold stories and takes its viewers on a devotional journey."

programme.title: Sanrachna
programme.desc: Shelter - one of mankind's most basic physiological needs. At least that's what it started out as at the beginning of time. From dwelling in caves to carving out temples in mountains, mankind has redefined shelter with every passing era. Though the underlying philosophy of any monument is to serve some sort of function, great architecture is fuelled by imagination. India's architecture is built on that very imagination and is a fascinating fusion of both art and science. From strategically placed astronomy towers to impressive and awe-inspiring tombs, Indian architecture has pushed the limits of engineering and design. Sanrachna explores these architectural wonders and how the makers of these marvels made them without the aid of modern mechanics and machinery. With an immensely astute sense of engineering, the architects were able to construct fortresses that have stood the test of time, unshaken by its changes. Join our host Vaibhavi as she travels through the country discovering the fascinating stories behind India's outstanding monuments and its architecture. Sanrachna will leave you in awe of the past and its ability to do what we can't, even with our modern tools and fancy tricks.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: The Trail

programme.title: The Trail

programme.title: The Trail

programme.title: Epic Exploring

programme.title: Epic Exploring

programme.title: Epic Exploring
programme.desc: Historical Berlin offers Josh two days of adventures and hidden treasures including a former U.S. Spy Station used during the Cold War and an abandoned garage.

programme.title: Hunting Fish
programme.desc: Thom Hunt challenges himself to fish for Cod in picturesque Norway in freezing conditions.

programme.title: Survival Science
programme.desc: Nick and Laura create kick-ass tests to explore the immense power and startling speed of grizzly bears. They use Hollywood stunt tools to experience an attack. Then try to recreate a “miracle” arrow shot that saved a man from being killed by a bear.

programme.title: Survival Science
programme.desc: In this exciting episode we'll find out the reasons why tree stand accidents happen and how we can prevent them. Cool science mixed with dynamic experiments send our hosts, our stunt team and our special crash test dummies plummeting to the ground.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: In the Kalahari Desert is an ancient tribe that has lived off the land since the beginning of man kind. These people are known as the Naru bushman.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild

programme.title: Exhibition Awesome
programme.desc: Humanity's knack for the extraordinary knows no bounds.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Will Vicky find the forever home of her dreams? This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase and special appearances by guest agent Jasmine Xuereb and mortgage broker Paul Meredith.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Steve Bailey to save the day! This week's episode features the lovely couple Chris and Rosa as they search for the perfect home. While Rosa is mainly concerned with cutting down her commute, Chris just wants to feel a connection to a property. Luckily for Steve, he's got his sister Helen, an interior designer and home stager, to help sway Chris - and it works!

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: Melvyn's culinary journey culminates to a homecoming this week- Singapore. In this city where he grew up, Melvyn hopes to rediscover the history and culture through two very important groups of Singaporeans- the Peranakans and the Eurasians. They represent the multi-ethnic past and present of the nation.

programme.title: Design For You: Trends
programme.desc: We explore the elegant and trendy studio of Designer Gert Johan Coetzee. We tap into social media for ideas and tips on upgrading your bathroom.

programme.title: World's Greatest Cruises
programme.desc: Exploring the tastes of Central Europe on a Danube River cruise the recipe for the oldest cake in the world famous wines of Austria's Wachau Valley tasting the waters in Budapest.

programme.title: Luxury Life
programme.desc: In this episode we look at the Peninsula Chicago, changes in the Chinese travel industry, Shang Xia in Shanghai, fashion innovation in the middle east, Jaguars new 16MY XJ in Mumbai and the balloon festival.

programme.title: Finest Homes
programme.desc: We're stepping it up a level. And by up, we mean four floors to a finest apartment transformed by architect and interior designer Ivan McCarthy Peens of Meuble Fine Furniture.

programme.title: Recipe For Love
programme.desc: Bronnie started drumming in her fifties. It's a tough choice to make when both of her dates reveal they love music as much as her.

programme.title: Home Rescue
programme.desc: Last year, when Isabel was born with Down syndrome, the house took a back seat.

programme.title: Duncan's Thai Kitchen
programme.desc: Duncan visits the mighty Mekong River to cook a wild chicken curry by the Moonlight Waterfalls before heading to the industrial city of Khon Khean.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Professional photographer Virginia loves her cottage-style home in the city - but lately it doesn't love her back. A look that was once charming is now dated and in need of a serious makeover, starting with the worn out floors and ancient kitchen appliances. Designer Samantha Pynn applies eco-friendly kitchen ideas, energy saving appliances and 'up-cycles' existing items in the living room to create a beautiful Modern Country oasis in the city.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Darlene and Bruce are in the market for a new home and have enlisted Laura to help them out. Darlene's one request is that they stay close to their current home, where their daughter goes to school. For Bruce, quality construction materials and workmanship are of paramount importance. One thing the entire family agrees on is that the backyard should have a fantastic entertainment space since they spend plenty of time together outdoors and enjoy having guests over.

programme.title: Design For You: Trends
programme.desc: Ehrardt Nieuwoudt from Kim H Designs takes us on a tour of the iconic Sanctuary Mandela which he and his team have designed.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: For this episode, Ben's planned an EPIC 48 hours in Utah, starting in Salt Lake City before venturing down to Zion National Park - but what will the other guys make of his itinerary?

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: This time, Mike's planned 48 hours in New Mexico... And he's determined to show the guys as much of it as possible!! From the White Sands National Park, to Hatch, Santa Fe, Albuquerque and Taos! How do you think he'll get on??!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Finishing their Four Corners adventure, it's Barry's turn, and he's not exactly known for his organization skills! Watch as he takes the friends from Grand Junction to the Grand Mesa and on to Vail and Boulder... How will the guys judge him, and who will be the overall winner?!

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: A romantic trip to Colorado takes a windy turn when Jason pushes Tayler, despite her hesitation, to summit Mt. Democrat in 70 mph winds and -19 degree weather.

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Jason loves mountain biking. Tayler prefers to read a book. Jason is up for any adventure tossed at him. Tayler likes to be a bit more prepared. Will the adventures that await in Arkansas leave the couple questioning if they have anything in common?

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Tayler and Jason travel to Eureka Springs, Arkansas, a town with a rich history and home to one of the most haunted hotels in America, The Crescent. Jason convinces Tayler to stay one night, but will that stay lead to a night they don't want to remember?

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Jason has attempted to climb the Grand Teton, located in Wyoming, three times before the couple's adventure out west. Will the fourth time be a charm? Or will life's unplanned moments present even greater challenges than Jason anticipated?

programme.title: National Parks Adventure
programme.desc: A team of modern day explorers take an off-trail adventure through the national parks of the USA, showing the awe-inspiring beauty found within America's most legendary outdoor playgrounds.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy dives into some meaty masterpieces including a poutine burger in Colorado, potato chip pie in Texas and killer clay-pot chicken in Arizona.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: A long string of coral islands stretching beautifully across the sea, the Florida Keys ultimately forms the southernmost tip of the continental U.S. Though it's considered the land of the Eternal Vacation.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Welcome to Samantha's home! No, not Brooklyn, but 4 ½ hours north on the small but beautiful New Hampshire Seacoast where she grew up. Stretching only 19 miles along the Atlantic Ocean, this region packs a punch. With a rich, colonial history and a hard working culture, discover why the New Hampshire Seacoast is Samantha's original Place to Love!

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Savannah, Georgia, is a destination that hardly needs an introduction. Just saying the name conjures up images of dripping Spanish moss, historic squares, and elegant architecture. It's a place where art and creativity is embedded into the very fiber of the people. Whether it's diving into the city's history, checking out its vibrant riverfront, enjoying local businesses, or learning the true meaning of leadership, join me as I see what makes Savannah a Place to Love.
